scope: Immediate migration of top-level control/*/runs into the 3-action-unit model without touching nested registry/runs.

responsibilities: dispatch workers with disjoint write scopes
merge worker outputs in dependency order
run final path and schema validation
remove empty top-level control/*/runs directories at the end

workers.title: project_domain manifests migration
workers.done_definition: manifests moved and internal references under owned scope updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
json.tool passes for changed json files
non_goals: do not edit reports or registries

workers.title: project_domain reports migration
workers.done_definition: reports moved and owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
non_goals: do not edit manifests or registries

workers.title: project_domain context packages migration
workers.done_definition: context package trees moved intact and owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
non_goals: do not edit reports, manifests, or registries

workers.title: project_domain active resource bundle migration
workers.done_definition: active domain resource trees moved and owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
non_goals: do not edit archive lanes or registries

workers.title: project_domain archive bundle migration
workers.done_definition: archive-classified domain material moved and owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
non_goals: do not edit active domain resources outside owned paths

workers.title: project_agent_ops manifests and plans migration
workers.done_definition: agent-ops plans and manifests moved and owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
json.tool passes for changed json files
non_goals: do not edit reports, smoke, or registries

workers.title: project_agent_ops reports, smoke, and logs migration
workers.done_definition: agent-ops report and smoke resources migrated, logs archived, owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
non_goals: do not edit manifests or registry

workers.title: user_decisions runs migration
workers.done_definition: user decision reports and support assets migrated and owned-scope references updated
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits
non_goals: do not edit ADRs or decision registry

workers.title: team runs and team migration docs sync
workers.done_definition: team migration report relocated and team-wide migration docs reflect actual moved paths
required_checks: rg old path returns no owned-scope hits except intentional historical references
non_goals: do not edit project_domain or project_agent_ops resources

workers.title: registry and path-index synchronization
workers.done_definition: registry files point at migrated locations and no stale top-level runs paths remain in active indexes
required_checks: json.tool passes for changed registry files
rg stale top-level runs paths returns no active-index hits
non_goals: do not move resource or archive bodies directly
